name: Tabloid Press

abilities.name: Sensory Overload
abilities.text: After a model gains an Entranced token, one model with this ability may increase this crew's scandal bar by 1.

abilities.name: Hostile Interview
abilities.text: When an enemy model with an Entranced token within 2" of this model would gain an Entranced token, it instead gains a Slow token.

actions.name: Entrapment
actions.effects: The target gains an Entranced token. An ally with LoS to the target may move up to its Sp toward the target.

triggers.name: Caught in the Act
triggers.text: Place a Strategy marker within 1" of the target within 3" of its current location.

extraction_notes: Scandal bar is referenced but definition not on this card (likely on Master stat card)
Entrapment has Signature symbol shown as black diamond
Range shows '+' symbol before 12" which typically indicates 'in LoS'
